evals.prompt: I want to create a new Level 1 template for projects using Supabase as the data layer and Nuxt as the frontend. We'll also use Trigger.dev for background jobs. Call it project-supabase-nuxt.
evals.expected_output: The create skill clones project-template into a new project-supabase-nuxt directory, fills stack.json with level=1 and the correct layers/plugins, customizes CLAUDE.md with the tech stack, updates .env.example with Supabase and Trigger.dev vars, searches for matching Agents Store plugins, validates the result, and makes an initial commit.
expectations: Clones project-template (Level 0) as the parent, not another Level 1 template
Creates a new directory named project-supabase-nuxt
Fills stack.json with level=1, parent='project-template', stack='supabase-nuxt'
Populates stack.json layers: data=['supabase'], logic=['nuxt', 'trigger-dev'], interface=['nuxt']
Customizes CLAUDE.md with Supabase + Nuxt tech stack details
Updates .env.example with Supabase variables (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY)
Searches plugin directories for matching technology plugins
Initializes a new git repo and makes an initial commit

evals.prompt: Create a Level 2 client project for Widgets Inc from the project-directus-nextjs template. It's a corporate website with a blog and team directory.
evals.expected_output: The create skill clones project-directus-nextjs into widgets-inc-website, sets stack.json to level=2 with parent=project-directus-nextjs, prompts for real credentials and resource IDs, and customizes CLAUDE.md with the client project name and description.
expectations: Uses project-directus-nextjs (Level 1) as the parent template, not project-template
Creates a directory with a client-prefixed name (e.g., widgets-inc-website) without 'project-' prefix
Sets stack.json level to 2 with parent='project-directus-nextjs'
Inherits the stack, layers, and plugins from the Level 1 parent
Customizes CLAUDE.md with the client name and project description
Prompts user about credentials and environment configuration

evals.prompt: Create a Level 1.5 demo template from project-directus-nextjs. It should be called demo-directus-nextjs and include sample blog posts, a team directory page, and seed data scripts.
evals.expected_output: The create skill clones project-directus-nextjs into demo-directus-nextjs, sets stack.json to level=1.5, inherits all Level 1 content, and sets up the demo-specific structure with sample data scaffolding.
expectations: Clones from project-directus-nextjs (Level 1), not project-template (Level 0)
Creates demo-directus-nextjs directory with demo- prefix
Sets stack.json level to 1.5 with parent='project-directus-nextjs'
Inherits all stack, layers, and plugins from the Level 1 parent
Mentions or scaffolds seed data scripts
Mentions sample content structure (blog posts, team directory)
Makes an initial commit
